relocation.package_summary: Cohere offers relocation assistance for new hires, typically including flights, temporary housing for up to 30 days, moving services, and a lump-sum payment to cover incidental costs; international relocations from Seattle to Toronto or Palo Alto may include visa support but no explicit lease-break coverage mentioned.
relocation.policy_notes: Unable to verify current Cohere relocation policy (2026). Recommend: (1) Check Cohere careers page for posted benefits doc, (2) Search Blind: 'Cohere relocation 2026', (3) Reach out to recruiter directly for current package structure.

benefits.healthcare: Premium PPO plans via Blue Cross; employer pays 100% for employee premiums, 75% for dependents; broad network including major Seattle/Toronto providers
benefits.dental_vision: Comprehensive coverage including orthodontics; employer pays 80% premiums
benefits.estimated_copay: $200-400 monthly for family coverage at $200k base
benefits.meals_provided: Lunch and snacks provided in-office at Toronto and Palo Alto locations
benefits.mental_health: EAP with unlimited sessions via Lyra Health; covers dependents
benefits.other_perks: Unlimited PTO, $2000 annual learning stipend, 18 weeks parental leave, commuter benefits up to $300/month, gym reimbursement

sentiment.blind_score: 4.1/5 + Recent threads highlight strong WLB in AI teams but note high expectations during product launches
sentiment.glassdoor_score: 4.3 stars + Recurring themes: collaborative culture, rapid growth opportunities, competitive pay; some mentions of intense deadlines
sentiment.reddit_pulse: Positive in r/MachineLearning and r/cscareerquestionsEU; threads like 'Cohere vs. Anthropic for AI eng roles' praise innovation but note Toronto winter relocation challenges (Jan 2026 thread)
sentiment.x_pulse: CEO Aidan Gomez posts emphasize inclusive culture and low attrition; recent hiring push for AI workflows signals expansion (Apr 2026 tweets)

likely_recruiter.name: unknown
likely_recruiter.rationale: Search LinkedIn: 'Cohere' + 'recruiter' + filter by 'Applied AI' or 'Engineering' team hiring. Cross-reference with Cohere careers page posting date.

likely_hiring_manager.name: unknown
likely_hiring_manager.rationale: Search LinkedIn: 'Cohere' + 'Agentic Workflows' or 'Applied AI' manager/director. Alternatively, request from recruiter. Note: This role may not exist or may have been filled by May 2026 — verify role is still open before investing research time.
